library.title: Cauk chiahnak
library.subtitle: Na aw le guitar projects, ruahnak in chuah tiang.

no_results.title: Project pakhat hmanh hmuh a si lo
no_results.description: Kawlnak asiloah dirhmun thleidannak kha remh i zuam.

empty.title: Na cauk chiahnak inn cu a lawng
empty.description: Project thar kha a hramthawk tein thawk, asiloah disk ah na ngeih cangmi thilri pawl kha luhter.

project_dialog.title: Project thar
project_dialog.description: Min pe law record tuahnak lam kha thim.

album_dialog.title: Album thar
album_dialog.description: Aa pehtlaimi project pawl kha album pakhat ah fonh hna.

album.empty: Hi album ah project a um rih lo.
album.delete_confirm_description: Project pawl cu hloh an si lai lo, " {{name}} " in aa pehtlaimi lawng an si lai.

delete_project.confirm_description: Mah nih hin project le a chung i a ummi thil vialte kha a hloh dih. Hihi remh khawh a si ti lo.

record.title: Record
record.subtitle: A thiangmi hmanthlak kha tlaih, na level kha zoh, cun script kha zulh.
record.device_empty: Luhnak thilri pakhat hmanh hmuh a si lo.

guide.title: Lamhruainak tonnak
guide.subtitle: Cawnpiaktu nih script kha step pakhat hnu pakhat in lamhruai seh, lumternak in chimmi biafang tiang.
guide.unavailable: Lamhruainak session cu server ah a um rih lo.
guide.select_project_device: Hika in step pawl record tuahnak ding caah project le input thilri kha thim.
guide.mark_done: A dih cang — a hnu step
guide.no_record_step: Lungthawhnak step — record tuah a hau lo.
guide.complete_body: Script chung i a tthen kip kha na khumh dih cang. Project Audio tab ah kir law na duh bikmi hmanthlak kha thim.

best2min.hint: A tthawng bikmi 2-minute window hmuh khawhnak ding caah a dihlak in thazaang le fiang tein hlathlainak a tuah — a hnu zongah kut in a kauhnak kha na remh khawh rih.
best2min.unavailable: Minute 2 chung a tha bikmi hlathlainak cu hi server ah a um rih lo.

record.takes_empty: Hi session ah hin hmanthlak an thlakmi a um rih lo.
record.select_project_first: Hramthawknak ding caah project pakhat thim.

no_takes.title: A lak rih lo
no_takes.description: A thar in lak asiloah a um cangmi file kha luhter.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Raw audio le process tuahmi vialte cu hloh dih an si lai.

pipeline.title: Riantuannak chain
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Install a si lomi a dang a herh

export.title: Ramdang kuat
export.description: A donghnak file kha tuah cangmi version in langhter.

notes.placeholder: Hi project kong he pehtlai in zalong tein ṭialmi...

lyrics.placeholder: Hika ah hlabia tial. Suno meta-tags khumh awkah a kam i a ummi palette kha hmang.
lyrics.versions_empty: A chiahmi version a um rih lo.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: A tu cafang cu {{date}} ah chiahmi version in thlen a si lai.
lyrics.metatags_hint: Cursor ah khumh awkah tag pakhat kha hmet.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: A fiang lomi — a phichuak cungah zeihmanh huham a ngei lo men lai.
lyrics.metatags_empty: Meta-tags register tuahmi a um lo.

prompts.preview_empty: Hmuhsaknak hmuh khawhnak ding caah template pakhat thim law variable pawl kha tling tein khumh.
prompts.char_count_warning: Cafang 1000 cung style halnak cu Suno nih a tlawmter khawh.
prompts.saved_to_project: Prompt cu project ah chiah a si
prompts.history_empty: A hlan version a um lo.

stems.title: Aw le guitar
stems.separate_button: A dang tein aw le guitar
stems.empty: Hi lakmi hi tthen a si rih lo. A dang tein aw le guitar theih awkah tthennak tuah.
stems.capability_missing: Hi server ah hin source thleidannak cu chiah a si lo.
stems.unavailable: Hi server ah hin aw/guitar tthennak a um rih lo.

import.title: Luhter
import.subtitle: Disk cung ah a um cangmi project pawl kha cauk chiahnak ah luhpi hna.

step1.title: Folder kawl
step1.description: Na project le track pawl he root folder kha langhter.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg hmuh a si lo — thlen a herhmi file pawl cu hlonh an si lai.

step2.title: Thilri zohfel
step2.description: Na fehter hlanah min, dirhmun le zeidah luhter a si lai ti kha zoh hmasa.
step2.no_audio: Aw pakhat hmanh hmuh a si lo

step3.title: Luhter
step3.description: File pawl copy tuah ding le project pawl ser ding in fehter.
step3.copy_originals: Cauk chiahnak ah a hramthawk file pawl kha copy tuah
step3.done_description: A tanglei project pawl hi na cauk chiahnak ah sermi an si.

templates.title: Template
templates.subtitle: Suno caah hman tthan khawhmi biahalnak template le meta-tags.
templates.delete_confirm_description: Hihi remh khawh a si ti lo.

editor.template_hint: Variable pakhat cio aa telnak hmun kha a min kha a tlongmi pahnih in khumh in hmelchunhnak tuah — tahchunhnak ah, "genre" timi variable cu a hramthawknak le a kharnak brace pahnih in hrenmi genre ah a cang.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Suno nih hlabia chung ah a hngalhmi dirhmun le style tags.

tier_legend.1: Tier 1 — cazin ah khumhmi le aa khatmi
tier_legend.2: Tier 2 — a tlangpi in a ttha
tier_legend.3: Tier 3 — aa thleng khomi thil sining

metatags.empty: Custom meta-tags a um rih lo.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: System konglam, holh, le a hlankan in duhmi hna.
settings.gpu_none: GPU a petu pakhat hmanh hmuh an si lo
settings.lufs_target_hint: Takes chuah tikah a hramthawk ruahnak cheuhnak ah hman a si. Suno a tlarimi cu -14 LUFS hrawng ah a um.

guide.title: Suno record tuahnak lamhruainak
guide.subtitle: A ttha bikmi a phichuak hmuh khawhnak ding caah aw le guitar laknak zeitindah tlaih khawh a si.
guide.intro: Suno nih a thiangmi, a fiang lomi langhternak he a ttha bik in a ttuan. Hi lamhruainak nih hin timhtuahnak, tinhmi tlukruannak, le minutes 3-5 chung record tuahnak script a huap.

prep.title: Timhtuahnak
prep.body: A thlopmi khaan ah asiloah a nemmi thilri tampi a ummi khaan ah record tuah (puanzar, hnipuan, hnipuan chiahnak kuang chung). Fans le a thawngmi thil paoh kha phih hna. Record na tuah hlanah minutes 5 chung na aw kha lumter.

levels.title: Tlukruannak: -12 in -6 dBFS
levels.body: Meter cung ah -12 le -6 dBFS karlak ah a sangbik pawl kha i tinh. Cu tlawm deuh ahcun, hnulei aw-an cu a fiang deuh; a cunglei ah, tthencheunak risk a kai. Na thawk hlanah na hmuhmi kha chiah awkah Record cahmai cung i meter kha hmang.

distance.title: Mic hlatnak: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Microphone in 15 in 30 cm hlat ah um. Cu nak naih deuh nih cun plosives le naih tein um khawhnak kha a nganter; a hlat deuh ahcun aw-thawng le aw-an tam deuh a lak.

script.title: Cafang ttialmi
script.vowels: A hmunmi awfang — a, e, i, o, u
script.dynamics: Dynamics: nem tein thawk, aw thangpi in donghter
script.spoken_phrase: Biafang pakhat, cucaah Suno nih na aw a rel khawh

expectations.title: Suno nih zeidah aa ruahchan
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, a ro (reverb le effects a um lo), 3 in 5 minutes zohchunhnak. A thiang bik, a aiawh bikmi minutes 2 nih a ttha bikmi a chuahpi tawn.

status.em_progresso: A kal cuahmah lio a si

suno_voice_full.name: Suno caah aw tling
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 lamhruainak minutes: lumternak, awfang, tahfung, hla tthen hnih, a cawlcangh ning, le biafang pakhat.

step.warmup_inst: Minute pakhat hrawng chung hrum, hmur hninh (brrr), le nem tein aw chuah in i din. Record tuah a hau lo — hla na sak hlanah na hnar kha dinhter sawhsawh a si.
step.vowels_inst: Awfang pakhat cio — a, e, i, o, u — kha na aw nem tein second 3 in 4 tiang, aw nem tein tlaih. Mah nih Suno kha na aw a thiangmi kha a hngalh khawh nakhnga a bawmh.
step.scales: A cunglei le a tanglei ah a tah
step.scales_inst: "la" asiloah "na" ah a sawhsawh in a cunglei le a tanglei ah sak. A tlingmi a si a hau lo — na aw chuah khawhnak kha map tuah kha aa tinhmi a si.
step.section_inst: Na chim duhmi tinhmi taktak he hla kha bar 8 in 16 tiang sak. Technical tlamtlinnak nakin fiang tein le umtuning kha biapi deuh ah chiah.
step.section2_inst: Bars 8 in 16 tiang sak rih — a ttha bikmi cu a hlan he aa dangmi hlasaknak asiloah ṭhen pakhat a si. A phunphun tam deuh nih model kha na aw cawn awkah a bawmh.
step.dynamics_inst: Na hnar hler loin nem tein thawk in aw thangpi in biafang pakhat kha sak. Mah nih hin Suno na aw a thlen khawhnak kha a langhter.
step.spoken_inst: Biachim — hlasak hlah — bia tawite, a phung ning tein, nan i chawnh bantuk in. Mah nih Suno kha na aw aw taktak a hngalh khawh nakhnga a bawmh.

errors.preset_not_found: A hlankan in chiahmi hmuh a si lo.
errors.device_busy: Aw chuahnak thilri cu program dang nih a hmanmi a si.
errors.device_not_found: Aw chuahnak thilri hmuh a si lo.
errors.already_recording: Record tuahnak cu a kal cuahmah cang.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg cu install a si lo — hi file thlen awkah install tuah.
errors.permission_denied: Pekmi lam caah nawl pek a si lo.
errors.import_path_not_found: Luhternak lam hmuh a si lo.
errors.process_failed: Laknak tuah khawh a si lo.
errors.export_failed: File chuah khawh a si lo.
errors.record_failed: Record tuah hram thawk khawh a si lo.
